BatchConfigurationInstance.action: The action to perform on the instance; the value for this parameter in this API is: resize
BatchConfigurationInstance.spec: The instance specification for batch resizing
BatchConfigurationInstance.instanceIdList: A collection of instance IDs, up to 30 entries
BatchConfigurationInstance.enableJumboFrame: Whether to enable Jumbo Frame for the instance. true: enable Jumbo Frame; false: disable Jumbo Frame. Defaults to null. When null: if resizing to a spec that does not support Jumbo Frame, Jumbo Frame will not be enabled; if resizing from a non-supporting spec to a supporting spec, Jumbo Frame will not be enabled; if resizing between two specs that both support Jumbo Frame, the Jumbo Frame state follows the pre-resize setting (enabled remains enabled, disabled remains disabled).
